wikitext:
{{Sequel Disambiguation}} {{Keyword Infobox|Lightning|2}}
{{KW|Lightning|Lightning Orbs|2}} are one of the most common types of damage-dealing [[Orbs]] the {{KW|Defect||2}} can produce. Their [[StS2:Orbs#Passive|Passive]] effect deals 3 (+1 per {{BD|Focus||2}}) damage to a random enemy at the end of your turn. When {{KW|Evoke|Evoked|2}}, they deal 8 (+1 per {{BD|Focus||2}}) damage to a random enemy.

== Sources ==
=== Cards ===
* {{C|Zap||2}} - {{KW|Channel||2}} 1 {{KW|Lightning||2}}.
* {{C|Ball Lightning||2}} - {{KW|Channel||2}} 1 {{KW|Lightning||2}}.
* {{C|Lightning Rod||2}} - At the start of the next 2 turns, {{BD|Lightning Rod|Channel|2}} 1 {{KW|Lightning||2}}
* {{C|Chaos||2}} - {{KW|Channel||2}} 1 random Orb.
* {{C|Storm||2}} - Whenever you play a {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Defect&type:Power|Power|2}}, {{BD|Storm|Channel|2}} 1 ({{TS|positive||2}}) {{KW|Lightning||2}}.
* {{C|Tempest||2}} - {{KW|Channel||2}} X ({{TS|positive||X+1}}) {{KW|Lightning||2}}.
* {{C|Rainbow||2}} - {{KW|Channel||2}} 1 {{KW|Lightning||2}}.
* {{C|Voltaic||2}} - {{KW|Channel||2}} {{KW|Lightning||2}} equal to the {{KW|Lightning||2}} already {{KW|Channel|Channeled|2}} this combat.

=== Relics ===
* {{R|Cracked Core||2}} - At the start of each combat, {{KW|Channel||2}} 1 {{KW|Lightning||2}}.
* {{R|Infused Core||2}} - At the start of each combat, {{KW|Channel||2}} 3 {{KW|Lightning||2}}.

== Interactions ==
=== Synergies ===
* Damage from '''Lightning''' orbs will not be affected by anything that affects damage from {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attack|2}} cards, such as {{BD|Weak||2}}, {{BD|Flying||2}}, or {{BD|Slow||2}}.
* {{KW|Channel|Channeling|2}} large amounts of '''Lightning''' Orbs, along with extra orb slots from {{C|Capacitor||2}} or {{C|Modded}}, will increase the damage gained from playing {{C|Tesla Coil||2}} on an enemy.
* {{C|Thunder||2}} makes {{KW|Evoke|Evoking|2}} '''Lightning''' Orbs deal an extra instance of 6 (8 when {{KW|Upgrade|Upgraded|2}}) damage to the enemy that it hits.
* {{C|Shatter||2}} can also be used to deal a large amount of damage by {{KW|Evoke|Evoking|2}} all of your Orbs.

=== Anti-Synergies ===
* Any source of '''negative''' {{BD|Focus||2}} will make '''Lightning''' Orbs less effective.
